alexandru.name: Alexandru Radovici
alexandru.bio: Alexandru is a renowned expert in Rust programming and embedded systems with over 15 years of experience. He has led multiple large-scale projects in IoT and real-time systems.

ioana.name: Ioana Culic
ioana.bio: Ioana specializes in WebAssembly and modern web technologies. She has extensive experience in building high-performance web applications and training developers worldwide.

footer.description: Professional training in Rust, WebAssembly, and embedded systems with Qualiopi certification.
